meaning: vt.支撑,扶持,支持,支援,拥护,维持,赡养,忍受n.支撑,支持,支援,维持,赡养,支持者,支柱
examples: We assured him of our support.
I gave her my unqualified support.
My system came with eight dimly photocopied pages devoted mostly to support, warranty and return policies.
Despite support from MPs, and the British embassy in Moscow, officials demanded extra payments and paperwork.
